titleStmt.title: SII 33.139: original edition by K. Munirathnam and T. S. Ravishankar
No. 139. (A.R. No. B 244 of 1950.) Eṟṟabālem, Cumbum Taluk, Kurnool District.

summary.p: Slab set up on the hillock called dhanam-tippa near the 14th mile-stone on the way from Cumbum to Rēcherla.
This is dated Śaka 999, Piṅgala corresponding to 1077-78 A.D.

Registers a gift of 2 maruttus of wet land (under the tank) and 7 puṭṭis (of dry land) at Velivōlu by the king to the temple on the tank bund constructed by Rājēndrachōḍa-seṭṭi. The endowment was entrusted to the followers of the sthānapati Śāntaśiva Paṇḍita.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti sakava¨rṣa 999 neya
piṁgala saṁvatsara
śrāhi Aṁbbiya yā
keya rājēdracōḍaseṭṭi
cēsina ceṟuvu kaṭṭapai guḍi
ki śrīmanmahāmaṇḍalēśvara Ē
ṟuva bhīmarājulu dēvaraku
Iccina nīru nēla rēṇḍu ma
ṟutturu velipolaṁ Ēḍu pu
ṭlu Āḍlupaṭṭu dīni jeḍaku
ṇḍa naḍipinavāriki vēyi
kavilalu dānamu cēsi
na phalamu dīni Aḍipina vā
riki gaṁgakaṟuta vēyi ka
vilala caṁpina pāpāna paḍu
duru dīni stānapati śānta
śivapaṇḍitaranvayama ra
kṣiṁcinadi . svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā
yō harētu vasuṁndharā ṣaṣṭiva¨rṣa
śahasrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē
krimiḥ
Digital edition of SII 33.139 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
